questions.question: Describe the key differences between OTAVE (Operational Technology Asset Value Engineering) and FAIR (Factor Analysis of Information Risk) in terms of their application and focus. (10 marks)
An IoT device has a vulnerability that can be exploited remotely. Using OTAVE, what are the steps you would take to analyze and prioritize this risk? (10 marks)
An organization uses FAIR to assess the risk of a cyber-attack on its IoT system. What are the four key factors that FAIR considers when calculating the risk? (10 marks)
